title: Cabbage and Ukrainian Salad
description: A hearty Ukrainian-inspired salad with shredded cabbage, crunchy salty crumbly ingredients, and a fresh salad mix.

ingredients.name: Salty Crumbly Ingredients
ingredients.notes: Use crackers or croutons for this ingredient

ingredients.name: Salad
ingredients.notes: Use your favorite greens, vegetables, or fruits

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage and crushed salty crumbly ingredients.
2. Add the Ukrainian salad mix and chopped salad to the bowl.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the dressing ingredients.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad mixture and toss to coat.
